symptom: forge test found no PoC under audit/poc/ — foundry only discovers tests in the configured test dir
fix: Set FOUNDRY_TEST / a profile so audit/poc/ is compiled; keep via_ir=true.

symptom: ghcr.io/foundry-rs/foundry has ENTRYPOINT [/bin/sh,-c]; passing an argv list double-wraps and the real command is swallowed (misread as passed)
fix: Build the command as a single string for this image, not an argv list.

symptom: solc baked for src/ but not test/, so a scaffold's pinned pragma was never cached
fix: Bake test/ into the image too; positive-signal compile detector (Ran N tests), not a denylist.

symptom: forge phones home to binaries.soliditylang.org even under --network none when --use is combined with --offline (upstream bug #2412)
fix: Pass --offline WITHOUT --use; let forge auto-detect the solc version from pragma against the cache.

symptom: non-root container user (foundry uid 1000, HOME=/home/foundry) can't write a root-owned named volume mounted at /root
fix: Mount cache at the real $HOME; chown -R the volume from a --user root container first.

symptom: COPY . /image + forge build no-ops because copied cache_forge/out already look up-to-date, so the network fetch meant to be baked never runs
fix: forge clean && forge build --force inside the image; never RUN cmd || true on a load-bearing bake step.

symptom: Dockerfile ended on USER root, so runtime $HOME=/root and cached solc under the build user's home is invisible
fix: End the Dockerfile on the user containers should run as by default.

symptom: cloudflared quick tunnel idle-timeout (~60-100s) cuts a stream:false Ollama call mid-generation; client reads a truncated-but-parseable partial as real output
fix: Use stream:true (NDJSON) through any tunnel/proxy and reassemble chunks; audit EVERY call site (warm() too).

symptom: a struct/enum declared INSIDE a contract/interface is not a top-level declaration and cannot be a named-import target
fix: Import the containing contract/interface and reference the nested type as Contract.TypeName; flag nested types as needing dot-qualification.

trigger_signature: required caller-permission never reached the model
symptom: a shared char/token budget consumed in priority order starves later target items entirely (StrataCDO ate the whole budget before SharesCooldown)
fix: Split the budget per logical item; within an item, prioritize the specific function the caller referenced so truncation drops least-relevant content first.

symptom: a PoC drafted blind (title/location/description only, without the target source) invents contract methods that don't exist
fix: The drafting prompt MUST include the actual source of the file(s) in location; the agent reads it first.

symptom: local CPU-only Ollama (no GPU passthrough on Docker Desktop/macOS) is not viable for 7b interactive work
fix: Use a GPU host (Colab T4 + Ollama + cloudflared tunnel); install pciutils before first ollama serve or GPU is not detected.

symptom: a line-keyed error signature missed real stalls because the same error moves between lines across full rewrites
fix: Key stall detection on the error MESSAGE text (Error (NNNN): <message>), never the line number.
